summary: W875 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while projecting the one-provider W732 boundary/relation target-closedness normalized source/endpoint route data into W874. From one W732 provider, the route obtains the W874 endpoint-localized provider fields and checks direct bounded left calculus plus the bounded derived infinity-category package through W874, W873, W856, W853, W831, and W869/W870/W872. Product success remains false because the concrete W732 provider, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W875 moves the latest stable ExactAt boundary to one W732 boundary/relation target-closedness normalized route-data provider, but that concrete provider is still not instantiated.
The W732 provider still packages the remaining concrete boundary/relation data and target/closedness normalized source/endpoint data; W875 only proves this provider feeds the stable ExactAt route.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block the concrete W732 boundary/relation target-closedness normalized route-data provider.
Connect the resulting route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
